Dispute Resolution Policy: Any dispute arising from or relating to this Agreement shall first be submitted to good-faith negotiation between senior representatives of both parties for a period of 30 days. If negotiation fails to resolve the dispute, the parties agree to submit to mediation administered by the American Arbitration Association before resorting to litigation. Any arbitration shall be conducted in Delaware and governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law provisions. The prevailing party in any legal proceeding shall be entitled to recover reasonable attorneys' fees.
